Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Blueprint System (Parse → Resolve → Decompose → Execute)
Content:
The entire build pipeline depends on blueprints — markdown files describing block-by-block structures.

## Pipeline

Chat 'build a house' → ChatInterpreter/LLM → IntentDraft(blueprint='house') → IntentManager.ResolveBlueprint (aliases: 'house'→'small-house') → BuildGoalRequest('small-house') → GoalFactory.CreateAsync('Build:small-house') → MemorySmithBlueprintRepository.GetAsync('small-house') → finds blueprints/small-house.md → BlueprintParser.Parse → Blueprint record → BuildGoal → PlannerRouter → BuildGoalDecomposer → HtnTaskLibrary.DecomposeBuild → PlaceBlock/CraftItem actions → BlueprintExecutor → tool dispatch

## Blueprint Markdown Format

Frontmatter (YAML-style, --- delimited): id, name, tags, dimensions, materials, description.
Materials format: 'cobblestone x 63' or 'cobblestone: 63'.
Layers: ### Y=N headers followed by grid rows using single-character symbols.

Default legend (BlueprintParser.cs line 40-57):
. = air (skip), C = cobblestone, P = oak_planks, L = oak_log, G = glass_pane, D = oak_door,
T = torch, B = crafting_table, X = chest, S = oak_slab, H = red_bed, F = air/auto-placed

## BlueprintParser (Agent.Construction/BlueprintParser.cs)

Static class. Parse entry point: extracts frontmatter, parses metadata, legend, layers.
- ExtractFrontmatter: --- delimited key:value pairs
- ParseFrontmatter: id, name, tags, dimensions, materials, description
- ParseMaterials: supports 'block x qty' and 'block: qty' formats
- ParseLegend: merges with DefaultLegend, supports backtick-delimited and bare symbols
- ParseLayers: detects ### Y=N headers, validates grid rows via IsValidGridRow, emits PlacementBlock for non-air cells
- IsValidGridRow: guards against parsing prose as grid data

## IBlueprintRepository Interface

GetAsync(blueprintId) → Blueprint?
SearchAsync(query) → IReadOnlyList<Blueprint>
SaveAsync(blueprint) → slug (throws NotImplementedException — blueprints are wiki pages)

## MemorySmithBlueprintRepository (3-stage lookup)

1. Direct slug lookup on live MemorySmith gateway (page 'blueprints/{slug}')
2. Local file fallback — {localPagesRoot}/Data/Pages/blueprints/{slug}.md
3. Search fallback — gateway search for matching blueprint pages

Normalizes ID: underscores → hyphens, lowercase. Returns Blueprint with RawMarkdown preserved.

## BlueprintExecutor (Agent.Construction/BlueprintExecutor.cs)

Execute emits PlaceBlock actions sorted Y (floor first) → Z (back to front) → X (west to east). Each action has arguments: material, x, y, z (absolute world coords).

## Alias Resolution Points

1. IntentManager.BlueprintAliases: 'house'→'small-house' (Sprint 41 fix — was missing from LLM path)
2. ChatInterpreter.BlueprintAliases (duplicated, fast-path deterministic)
3. MemorySmithBlueprintRepository slug normalization

## Known Issues (Sprint 41)

- Blueprint alias resolution was missing from LlmChatInterpreter path — fixed by adding BlueprintAliases to IntentManager
- MemorySmithBlueprintRepository logging was insufficient — added ILogger with per-stage success/failure logging
- BlueprintExecutor does not handle partial blueprint placement resumption in survival mode
